![](https://bayharbortowers.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Hero.jpg)

### Bay Harbor islands    most coveted    waterfront address

Introducing Bay Harbor Towers, a boutique collection of forty-four private residences that elevate luxury island living to a new echelon.

Nestled along the northern shoreline where the pristine Indian Creek waterfront meets the vast expanse of Biscayne Bay, this striking architectural gem is a beacon of opulence and exclusivity.

Impeccably designed to evoke the feeling of living in your own private home, these one-of-a-kind, ultra-luxurious residences feature spacious, flow-through layouts, bespoke finishes, and endless water views with boat slips. These coupled with access to an endless suite of amenities, make it the unequivocal choice for living in Bay Harbor Islands.

![Water ripple](https://bayharbortowers.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/water-ripple-bg-1.jpg)

![](https://bayharbortowers.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/PPG2747_BayHarborIsland_S390_EXT_DuskHeroWater_R01-4@2x.jpg)

#### Architectural    excellence meets    interior design    perfection

Residences

![](https://bayharbortowers.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Living-Room.jpg)

Flow-through layouts distinguish these two, three, and four-bedroom private residences. Impeccably designed to separate common living areas from private quarters, these spacious interiors offer a perfect balance of functional spaces for both entertaining and personal retreats.

[Explore The Residences](https://bayharbortowers.com/residences/ "Learn more about residences")

##### A Distinguished    Collection Of    Amenities

Bay Harbor Towers offers an exceptional array of luxury amenities curated for maximum comfort and convenience.

[Explore The Lifestyle](https://bayharbortowers.com/lifestyle/ "Learn more about the lifestyle")

![](https://bayharbortowers.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Indoor-Lap-Pool.jpg)

Discover Bay Harbor Islands

###### Moments    from the    marina

[Explore The Neighborhood](https://bayharbortowers.com/neighborhood/ "Learn more about moments from the marina")

![Water background](https://bayharbortowers.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/BHT_19-1.jpg)

# Bay Harbor Towers

### **Bay Harbor Islands / 2027**

8 Stories / 44 Residences of
2, 3 & 4 Bedrooms

**10141 E Bay Harbor Dr, Bay Harbor Islands, FL 33154, USA**

Bay Harbor Towers an 8-story waterfront building designed to maximize comfort. Its 2 to 4 bedroom homes range from 1,870 to 3,393 square feet. The modern structure design is a masterpiece by Kobi Karp; the signature feature of Bay Harbor Towers the striking white-veined black marble façade.
Every residence is carefully crafted and features flow-thru spaces with bay views and large sunrise and sunset terraces, open-concept kitchens, floor-to-ceiling windows and much more. Five star amenities at this building include a rooftop pool and jacuzzi, wellness spa, fitness center, lounge and private marina, and Steven G’s elegant interior design. Bay Harbor Islands is a premium location close to the Design district, Bal Harbour Shops, fine dining, and beautiful beaches.

# Bay Harbor Towers \| Pricing, Photos & Floor Plans

## Features

### Building Features

- Bayhouse and Penthouse residences featuring
private pools ranging from 3,327– 4,912 SF
- Florida Green Building Coalition certified
- Private marina with 13 boat slips
- Common areas featuring the exquisite Italian furniture
brand Hessentia by Cornelio Cappellini
- 24/7 receptionist, concierge and valet
- Delivered fully finished with large format Italian porcelain
flooring, kitchens and bathrooms
- Beach club access
- Pet friendly
- Covered parking and EV charging
- Bicycle and water sports storage
- Architecture by Kobi Karp
- Interior design by Interiors by Steven G.
- Landscape design by CLAD
- Rooftop oasis featuring 55’ infinity edge pool and sunset jacuzzi, sundeck with chaise loungers, daybeds and cabanas, open-air summer kitchen with grills and dining areas
- Wellness spa with hot and cold plunge pools, steam room
and sauna
- 50’ indoor heated saltwater lap pool
- Massage treatment room, relaxation area, towel-service
- State-of-the-art fitness center and yoga studio with
bespoke Paragon® equipment
- Private marina and boat slips for boats ranging from 35’ to
50’ linear feet, direct ocean access through Haulover Inlet
- Owners lounge with news cafe
- Outdoor community greenspaces with relaxing hammock
garden and lounge seating areas
- Water sports launch dock

### Residence Features

- Private and semi-private elevator foyers
- Expansive, open-concept kitchen, dining and living areas perfect for family gatherings or entertaining guests
- Floor-to-ceiling windows, designed to provide abundant natural light
- Deep sunrise and sunset terraces
- Over-sized primary bedrooms with ensuite, spa-inspired private baths and expansive walk-in closet space
- Separate laundry rooms with full size washer and dryer
- Pre-wired for high-speed Wi-Fi
- Smart home system controls for lighting, thermostat, and
provisions for window shades
- Bayhouse & Penthouse residences feature private pools, summer kitchens and outdoor lounge areas with firepits
- European made oak wood cabinetry with fluted detailing and brushed brass fittings
- Honed marble countertops and backsplashes
- Wolf® appliance suite boasting a 5-burner gas cooktop with brass knobs
- Premium Sub-Zero® refrigerator-freezer, and wine cooler
- Dornbracht® faucets and pot filler
- Large workstation with 44” undermount sink
- European made custom double vanities
- Marble countertops
- Over-sized 65” soaking tub for deep relaxation
- Full-height glass enclosed luxury shower system including adjustable height hand shower and oversized rainfall showerhead

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/07-Bay-Harbor-Towers-Balcony.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Developer-PPG-Development.jpg)

PPG Development is a development firm led by Ari Pearl. Its investments include over 2,500 residential units and a collection of luxury hospitality projects throughout South Florida. PPG Development is committed to building for the community and redefining the collaboration between living and recreation, creating a comprehensive recreational encounter for its residents and guests. Their partners have over 20 years of combined experience in real estate private equity, acquisitions, financing, development, and brokerage.
